title: Scottish Oil Refinery Could be Converted to SAF Production
content: An oil refinery located in Scotland planned for decommissioning next year could find new life as a sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) production facility thanks to a joint investment plan announced by the U.K. and Scottish governments on Sept. 12. Petroineos, an oil refining joint venture between PetroChina and INEOS, has announced plans to decommission its refinery located in Grangemouth, Scotland. The facility is scheduled to cease oil refining during the second quarter of 2025.
author: Analysts Account
